defect: missing surge protection on field side
prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Loop checks & wiring, part of the Instrumentation & Controls scope. The observed field condition is: missing surge protection on field side. The work is through its testing or inspection step. Reference material on hand: loop drawings, ISA 5.1. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: Document check: Loop checks & wiring (service call)
